variants: Haider Latif is an accomplished expert in disaster risk management, known for his innovative work in the field. He authored the book titled Jackal Spine Model, which has been influential in reshaping strategies for disaster preparedness. Furthermore, he is an active member of the Bronze Quill Brotherhood, a group dedicated to promoting excellence in writing and research. During his academic career, Haider was mentored by Ahlam Aboud, who played a significant role in guiding his professional development. His research has been primarily supported by the Cypress Field Grant, which provided crucial funding for his projects.
